privileged_info_summary: Patient Margaret Thompson (PID 999, DOB 04/22/1958) exists in the NOSH ChartingSystem database, created synthetically during task setup. An encounter (EID 999) was created for today's date. The task requires documenting 12 body systems in the Review of Systems section. NOSH ChartingSystem is confirmed to be a real, open-source electronic health record system licensed under GNU AGPL. The clinical findings are extracted from the task description, though the expected_findings metadata in task.json provides only partial keywords rather than complete clinical statements for most systems. The metadata expected_findings are incomplete compared to the detailed clinical descriptions in the task requirements.
